subject: mtd: maps: fix error return code of physmap_flash_remove()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-1-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec).
